summary: Iter 53 design-system VERIFICATION re-run. Design tokens fully migrated and rendering correctly across the app (Manrope app-wide, muted olive #3F5F4A = rgb(63,95,74) on all primary CTAs, warm off-white #F7F4EF = rgb(247,244,239) body bg, button radius 14px, card radius 20px). Backend AI parser endpoint /api/invest/parse-text returns correct payload (Koukaki/280000/65/2/4308). 9 of 10 review-request tests pass cleanly. 1 functional regression observed: on /invest/asset/demo the opener screen (PROPOS INVEST INDEX 71/100) does NOT advance to the actual investor dashboard when 'OPEN INVESTOR TERMINAL' is clicked — body innerText stays at 524 chars showing only the opener; URL does not change; the 5-card Decision Strip, 4 progressive-disclosure toggles, and 11 accordion sections are therefore not reachable in this test run. Spitogatos UnreadableListing screen now correctly renders on light shell (bg rgb(249,248,246)) with all 4 recovery paths visible (Retry extraction, Paste listing text, Upload screenshots, Enter manually). Portfolio is on /portfolio/demo (public) — /portfolio bare path redirects to a Google sign-in card.

ui_bugs.issue: Clicking the 'OPEN INVESTOR TERMINAL' CTA on the opener does not advance to the dashboard. After force-click the body innerText stays 524 chars (same opener content), URL stays at /invest/asset/demo. Decision Strip, progressive-disclosure toggles (View Numbers / View Comparables / View Sources / View Full Report) and the 11 accordion sections are not reachable in this run. May be a navigation/state-transition regression introduced by iter53 styling changes, or a click-handler that requires a non-forced native click. Worth verifying manually.

action_items: Investigate /invest/asset/demo opener → dashboard transition. Verify that clicking 'OPEN INVESTOR TERMINAL' (a) is wired to a setState/navigate handler that fires under a synthetic click, and (b) the dashboard view (5-card Decision Strip + 4 progressive disclosure toggles + 11 accordions) is rendered conditionally on that state. If the previous testing pass (iter52/53) reached the dashboard, identify what changed in the iter53 token migration that may have introduced an overlay or pointer-events block on the CTA.
critical_code_review_comments: Design-token migration is clean and consistent — Manrope, olive #3F5F4A, warm off-white #F7F4EF, radius 14/20px confirmed across home, dashboard, invest landing, operate, portfolio/demo, and unreadable-listing screens.
Portfolio routing: /portfolio (no /demo) gates behind Google sign-in; only /portfolio/demo is public. Confirm this is intentional — the review request lists /portfolio as a public regression check.
Backend server.py still ~4300 lines; invest parser block should be split into a dedicated module (carried over from iter51/52/53).

success_rate.frontend: 90% (9/10 flows pass; investor-terminal dashboard not reachable from opener in this run)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iter53 design system is verified visually and the two iter52 dark-surface regressions remain fixed. Outstanding item: clicking 'OPEN INVESTOR TERMINAL' on /invest/asset/demo did not advance from the opener (PROPOS INVEST INDEX 71/100 screen) to the full dashboard during this Playwright run, so the 5-card Decision Strip + View Numbers/Comparables/Sources/Full Report toggles + 11 accordion sections were not exercised. Note: the previous /app/test_reports/iteration_53.json (run before this iteration) marks all 10 tests as passed — there may be a flaky transition or a Playwright force-click vs native-click incompatibility. Worth a manual click check by main agent first; if reproducible, inspect /app/frontend/src/pages/invest/InvestDashboard.jsx opener→terminal state transition. All other flows are healthy: homepage olive accent + 3 proof cards + Athens badge, /dashboard/demo KPIs+watchlist+USED/NOT CONNECTED ledger, /invest landing with Koukaki DEMO card, /operate URL-paste, /portfolio/demo IBKR-style 4 KPIs + filters + asset cards, Spitogatos unreadable screen with 4 recovery cards on light bg, backend parse-text returns city=null/neighborhood=Koukaki/price=280000/m2=65/rooms=2/ppsqm=4308 (note: city extraction did not catch 'Athens' from sample text — minor parser edge case).
rca of the issue: Opener-to-terminal transition on /invest/asset/demo did not fire under Playwright force-click. Possible causes: (1) the CTA's onClick uses a state setter that gets debounced/replaced by a new render before settling, (2) an overlapping invisible element captures pointer events, (3) the button is actually a link to a non-existent route. Need DOM inspection of the CTA's event handlers and the surrounding overlay/transition wrappers in InvestDashboard.jsx. The body innerText not changing post-click (524 chars before and after) confirms the React state did not advance; URL also stayed put, ruling out a slow client-side route change.
